provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, attractive young woman in a skin-tight low-cut uniform that emphasizes her figure, with perfectly styled flowing hair and flawless makeup, high-heeled boots, the uniform has been tailored to be form-fitting in ways that would be impractical on a ship, she poses with one hand on her hip, this is cosplay not clothing
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Skin-tight form-fitting uniform emphasizing figure, styled hair, makeup, high heels. Cosplay not clothing. Violates CLO-003, MAT-002.
